title: CSIR NPL Technician Vacancy 2026, Free Application Form & Apply -
short_info: CSIR NPL Technician Vacancy 2026: The National Physical Laboratory has issued a notification for the position of ITI Technician. The recruitment drive comprises 20 vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before 30 June 206, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the CSIR NPL Technician Vacancy 2026 recruitment is provided below.
